Preamble has a visible preamble and term.

Forms

Concealed primary: end.

Concealed primary plus secondary: end.

Concealed primary plus secondary plus tertiary: end.

Concealed macro: end.

Visible flow: iota end.

Visible macro: kappa end.

Body paragraph.
